# Unbalanced forces cause acceleration

## Short Teaching Summary
When forces acting on an object do not balance, the resultant force causes the object to accelerate in the direction of the resultant force.

## Best Examples
- Unbalanced forces will cause acceleration, deceleration, or a change in direction.
